title: Soryu vs Shikinami
wikitext:
[]: Soryu vs. Shikinami             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Nov 04, 2009 7:53 pm What's the difference between Sohryu and Shikinami? Honestly, I really didn't see any difference in the two...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Nov 04, 2009 7:55 pm Fanservice. Other than the fact that Shikinami is a captain, they are almost exactly the same.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Nov 04, 2009 8:25 pm Really? From all the whining I've heard they were two different people that looked nothing alike.

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Wed Nov 04, 2009 8:38 pm The ONLY thing they have in common is, in fact, the way they look. I guess "eyepatch!Asuka" will take care of that. Seriously, this thread is a shitstorm waiting to happen.

[]: Re: What's the difference between... (spoilers)             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:06 pm CyberXIII wrote: What's the difference between Sohryu and Shikinami?

[]: Re: What's the difference between... (spoilers)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:14 pm Rock-Slash wrote: CyberXIII wrote: What's the difference between Sohryu and Shikinami?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:20 pm Shikinami's social ineptitude and loneliness are emphasized a lot more than Soryu's; she doesn't even managae to befriend Hikari. That's the main difference, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:25 pm One is a nicer version of old school Asuka but can never replace her in our hearts.

[]:             Quote Post by Boredom » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:28 pm Soryu= Popular Girl most everyone likes, somewhat outgoing, can be annoying, but is generaly lovealbe like most real girls. Shikinami=Anti-social and an egotist with an eyepatch. Not much depth, made to please people who don't get Soryu. IMO anyways 9_9

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:35 pm Sor - Must be the best at everything, must be! Has an ATF that blocks off Shinji till the very end! Shi - Is much friendlier to Shinji.............Because this is all in his head and shes a nicer version of Asuka! Daaa Daaa Daaaaa!

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:36 pm I actually thought Shikinami was a somewhat more realistic take on the same character. Soryu's the girl that everyone likes despite her freakish personality Shikinami's as isolated as you'd expect someone with her attitude and outlook on life to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 04, 2009 9:57 pm Lucretius wrote: I actually thought Shikinami was a somewhat more realistic take on the same character. Soryu's the girl that everyone likes despite her freakish personality Shikinami's as isolated as you'd expect someone with her attitude and outlook on life to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:05 pm Boredom wrote: but is generaly lovealbe

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:10 pm Boredom wrote: Shikinami=Anti-social and an egotist with an eyepatch.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:19 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Shikinami seems just as sociable as Shoryu.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:25 pm Ah right. I forgot about the part with Hikari. I don't really see much of a problem with her punching the guy though. I'd expect that from NGE Asuka as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:49 pm Neither are especially likable people, Sohryu was just better at putting up a facade at school. In the end she was only able to make one friend, making her just about as socially successful as Shikinami. The alterations they made to Rei were far more blatant.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:59 pm Rodeo wrote: The alterations they made to Rei were far more blatant.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 04, 2009 11:02 pm You didn't notice Rei's changes?

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Nov 04, 2009 11:19 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: You didn't notice Rei's changes?
